objective.summary: Upgrade the existing SAMSWEET site from an engineering MVP into a conversion-focused premium B2B technology storefront.
objective.primaryAction: Build an SSD / memory inquiry list and submit it to WhatsApp.

module.name: Header
module.requirement: Desktop centered glass navigation with light blur and compact sticky behavior.
Mobile keeps logo, language, and cart as the primary entries.
WhatsApp CTA text is "WhatsApp Inquiry".
Cart count is visible and active language is clear.
Arabic RTL layout remains natural.

module.name: Hero
module.requirement: Communicate SSD / Memory wholesale in three seconds.
Use large SSD visual, restrained glow, and Bento stats.
Add trust strip: Wholesale-ready, Local assets, Multi-language inquiry, WhatsApp order flow, Contact for current quotation.

module.name: Product Categories
module.requirement: Use Bento category cards with name, use case, popular capacities, product count, and Explore.
Clicking filters product grid and scrolls to products.
Mobile must not cause page-level horizontal overflow.

module.name: Product Section
module.requirement: Search placeholder references capacity, interface, PCIe, and SATA.
Show result count and active filter chips with clear action.
Product cards use larger product visuals, spec chips, procurement-style quantity control, and Add to Inquiry feedback.

module.name: Why SAMSWEET
module.requirement: Use B2B trust cards: clear product families, wholesale workflow, QC, export communication, multi-language buyer experience, fast quotation by WhatsApp.

module.name: Technical Specs
module.requirement: Present procurement decision matrix: Interface, Capacity range, Use case, Inquiry note.
Do not invent speed, certifications, or unsupported claims.

module.name: Wholesale Order Flow
module.requirement: Four-step timeline: Choose products, Add quantities, Submit WhatsApp inquiry, Confirm quotation and shipment.

module.name: Quality Warranty
module.requirement: Use product/inspection visual with checklist: batch inspection, packaging support, final specifications by quotation, warranty confirmed before order.

module.name: FAQ
module.requirement: Modern accordion, clear open/hover states, touch-friendly, RTL safe.

module.name: Final CTA
module.requirement: Strong conversion area with "Ready to build your SSD order list?", Open Inquiry Cart, and Chat on WhatsApp.

module.name: Footer
module.requirement: Four columns: Brand, Product Categories, Contact, Languages / Disclaimer.
WhatsApp display is +86 136 0248 9689.

viewport.requirement: Hero is compact enough to reveal product context quickly.
Sticky cart button is visible and clickable.
Controls are at least 44px tall where practical.
Cart drawer is 100% width with visible close and accessible submit.

accessibility.requirement: Arabic sets html dir="rtl" and uses logical CSS properties.

technical-constraints.constraint: No backend, database, login, payment, or heavy dependencies.
Preserve existing data attributes used by delegated event handling.
Keep GitHub Pages static deployment, SEO, sitemap, and robots.
